microsoft_ft: Drove **AI agent deployment** across the full lifecycle — from requirements to post-launch optimization — building an internal planning agent that cut cycle time by **39%** and expanded drill capacity by 21% across enterprise customers.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing deployment playbooks to sustain **45+ annual resilience drills** and drive $14M+ impact across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation model.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI agent adoption** for code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.
Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation.

Improved data retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling more accurate query results.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.
Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built and socialized a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with data-driven confidence.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot deployment.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM process that cut turnaround time significantly.
Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and close margin leaks across high-volume service lines.

tailoring_notes: Wove 'AI agent deployment' and 'full lifecycle' (JD: 'Drive AI Agent deployments across the lifecycle') into microsoft_ft bullet 1 and as the framing anchor for the role.
Inserted 'deployment playbooks' (JD: 'Improve our playbooks for agent development and customer deployment') into microsoft_ft bullet 3 to mirror exact JD language.
Used 'AI-powered semantic search' (JD: 'leverage automated conversation discovery tools') in microsoft_2023 bullet 3 to surface discovery tooling experience.
Framed microsoft_2023 bullet 2 around surfacing feature gaps via user interviews, mirroring JD's 'qualitative insights' and 'define AI roadmaps' language.
Highlighted 'automated CI/CD pipelines' and agile ceremonies in amazon_robotics to reinforce execution velocity and technical collaboration with FDEs as called out in the JD.
